name: You stumbled into her Dream Castle
description:
Now this lonely fairy not sure how to react
(I couldn't find better picture. There's so little of them!)

She doesn't get appreciated enough. And it's not just my opinion. It's my belief!

Also one of the most interesting bosses as of late. Shame she would stay locked in the collab.

As for bot, here's some lore info I wrote purely out of my own understanding. You end up in the Dream Castle where Morpheus is Lord. But I wrote that you can access Dream Castle only if you knew story about it, and hence, dream of it on your own, becoming its visitor. Other way is as if Morpheus herself weaved you dream of it.

Hope it helps to start how you see it better. Because I'm too lazy to write more starting messages.

So wish you good RP.
creator: Avalonione
